markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review outreach performance and align on new campaign priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Outreach success:** A new LinkedIn campaign targeting workshop partner followers yielded \>60 positive replies in one day, a 30% increase over past campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [**Luma suspension:** GrowthX's Luma account is temporarily suspended for a spam-flagged email, blocking direct invites and shifting all event promotion to Understory.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [**New strategy:** A new targeted outbound strategy will be tested to drive demos directly, bypassing intermediate steps.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [**Blockers:** Two campaigns are blocked pending copy from GrowthX: the SIFT outreach automation and the LinkedIn Listener.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

## Topics

### Luma Suspension & Event Impact

  - [**Cause:** A spam-flagged email sent by Gloria Willis resulted in a temporary Luma account suspension.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [**Impact:** GrowthX cannot send direct invites or download attendee lists.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [**Workaround:** Understory will send registration links via email and LinkedIn, requiring leads to self-register.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [**Goal:** Reach 500 registrations for the upcoming workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [**Projection:** Mark Lim estimates this is achievable, noting \~40% of positive replies typically convert to sign-ups.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### New Outreach Strategy: Targeted Outbound

  - [**Objective:** Drive demos directly to qualified prospects, bypassing intermediate steps.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
    1.  [**Define ICP:** GrowthX to provide a Notion doc with ICP criteria (industry, funding, location) and intent signals (website traffic, hiring).](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
    2.  [**Build List:** Understory to source a list based on the ICP and signals.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
    3.  [**Launch Campaign:** Use the list for highly personalized outreach (e.g., referencing client success in a prospect's industry).](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)

### Campaign Performance & Pipeline

  - [**LinkedIn Workshop Campaign (HeyReach)**](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [**Performance:** \~50% connection acceptance rate (30% higher than average).](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [**Results:** \>60 positive replies in one day (37 from Understory copy, 22 from GrowthX copy).](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Success attributed to targeting followers of the workshop partner (Rob) and a related account (Fletch PMM).](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [**SIFT Outreach Automation**](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [**Status:** Blocked.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [**Dependency:** Awaiting copy from Jason Rode (GrowthX).](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**LinkedIn Listener**](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Status:** Blocked.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [**Dependency:** Awaiting copy from Jason Rode (GrowthX) for content-segmented emails.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

### Upcoming Event: Feb 19 Breakfast

  - [**Plan:** Understory will manage all promotion due to the Luma suspension.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [**Audience:** Bay Area locals, including leads invited to the Jan 29 breakfast.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [**Rationale:** High relevance for local events justifies a shorter outreach cadence than the standard monthly rule.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Gloria Willis:**](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
      - [Provide the Feb 19 breakfast attendee list and details.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
      - [Provide copy for the SIFT outreach automation and LinkedIn Listener.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [Create the ICP/intent signal Notion doc for the targeted outbound strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [**Mark Lim:**](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
      - [Launch the Feb 19 breakfast campaign upon receiving materials.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
      - [Launch the SIFT and LinkedIn Listener campaigns upon receiving copy.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**Jesus Yepez:**](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
      - [Set up the AI responder by EOW for the high volume of incoming replies.](https://fathom.video/share/ESGWwF-8pm6TeFtxZ--St9YRwtfaoq3y?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
